decisions.rationale: Observation base_record_id corridor_woodhaven-cross-bay-blvds matches an existing registry record with identical corridor name ('Woodhaven / Cross Bay Boulevards'), matching streets (Woodhaven Boulevard / Cross Bay Boulevard), same borough (Queens), and matching description (SBS corridor from Woodside to Rockaway Beach). The registry record already lists this observation's source (2012_06_25_brt_woodhaven_publicworkshop2_presentation) in its source_ids. Observation already resolves to its own base_record_id.
